device_name: Ingenia, Ingenia CX, Ingenia Elition, Ingenia Ambition, MR 5300 and MR 7700 MR Systems
intended_use: Philips Magnetic Resonance (MR) systems are Medical Electrical Systems indicated for use as a diagnostic device. This MR system enables trained physicians to obtain cross-sectional images, spectroscop
intended_use_full: Philips Magnetic Resonance (MR) systems are Medical Electrical Systems indicated for use as a diagnostic device. This MR system enables trained physicians to obtain cross-sectional images, spectroscopic images and/or spectra of the internal structure of the head, body or extremities, in any orientation, representing the spatial distribution of protons or other nuclei with spin.
ground_truth: ABR board certified radiologists' qualitative assessment of image quality properties and diagnostic sufficiency
other_metrics: Signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) improvement, artifact level reduction, sharpness improvement, contrast-to-noise ratio (CNR) improvement compared to predicate device
